name: bandatlas
description: Browser atlas of small-molecule UV–Vis, IR, Raman, teaching NMR, and MS bands
author: Nikshay Bisht <https://github.com/nikshaybisht>

scripts.build: node tools/build-dataset.mjs && tsc -b && vite build && node tools/spa-fallback.mjs
scripts.test: node tools/validate-seeds.mjs && node tools/validate-nmr-seeds.mjs && node tools/validate-ms-seeds.mjs && node tools/build-dataset.mjs && node --test tests/dataset.test.mjs tests/experimental.test.mjs tests/structures.test.mjs tests/seeds.test.mjs tests/export-labnote.test.mjs tests/schema.test.mjs tests/safe-url.test.mjs tests/nmr.test.mjs tests/ms.test.mjs
scripts.ci: oxlint --deny-warnings && node tools/validate-seeds.mjs && node tools/validate-nmr-seeds.mjs && node tools/validate-ms-seeds.mjs && node tools/build-dataset.mjs && node --test tests/dataset.test.mjs tests/experimental.test.mjs tests/structures.test.mjs tests/seeds.test.mjs tests/export-labnote.test.mjs tests/schema.test.mjs tests/safe-url.test.mjs tests/nmr.test.mjs tests/ms.test.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
